samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a 64-bit ripple carry adder with pipelining stages and registers for synchronization.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation.</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal indicating the availability of the result.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // Pipeline stages
        reg [63:0] adda_reg;
        reg [63:0] addb_reg;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage1;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage2;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage3;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage4;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage5;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage6;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage7;
        reg [63:0] sum_stage8;
        
        // Registers for enabling pipeline stages
        reg en_stage1;
        reg en_stage2;
        reg en_stage3;
        reg en_stage4;
        reg en_stage5;
        reg en_stage6;
        reg en_stage7;
        reg en_stage8;
        
        // Register for output enable signal
        reg o_en_reg;
        
        // Sequential logic for pipeline stages
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                adda_reg <= 64'd0;
                addb_reg <= 64'd0;
                sum_stage1 <= 64'd0;
                sum_stage2 <= 64'd0;
                sum_stage3 <= 64'd0;
                sum_stage4 <= 64'd0;
                sum_stage5 <= 64'd0;
                sum_stage6 <= 64'd0;
                sum_stage7 <= 64'd0;
                sum_stage8 <= 64'd0;
                
                en_stage1 <= 1'b0;
                en_stage2 <= 1'b0;
                en_stage3 <= 1'b0;
                en_stage4 <= 1'b0;
                en_stage5 <= 1'b0;
                en_stage6 <= 1'b0;
                en_stage7 <= 1'b0;
                en_stage8 <= 1'b0;
                
                o_en_reg <= 1'b0;
            end else begin
                if (i_en) begin
                    adda_reg <= adda;
                    addb_reg <= addb;
                    
                    en_stage1 <= 1'b1;
                end
                
                if (en_stage1) begin
                    sum_stage1 <= adda_reg + addb_reg;
                    
                    en_stage2 <= 1'b1;
                end
                
                if (en_stage2) begin
                    sum_stage2 <= sum_stage1;
                    
                    en_stage3 <= 1'b1;
                end
                
                if (en_stage3) begin
                    sum_stage3 <= sum_stage2;
                    
                    en_stage4 <= 1'b1;
                end
                
                if (en_stage4) begin
                    sum_stage4 <= sum_stage3;
                    
                    en_stage5 <= 1'b1;
                end
                
                if (en_stage5) begin
                    sum_stage5 <= sum_stage4;
                    
                    en_stage6 <= 1'b1;
                end
                
                if (en_stage6) begin
                    sum_stage6 <= sum_stage5;
                    
                    en_stage7 <= 1'b1;
                end
                
                if (en_stage7) begin
                    sum_stage7 <= sum_stage6;
                    
                    en_stage8 <= 1'b1;
                end
                
                if (en_stage8) begin
                    sum_stage8 <= sum_stage7;
                    
                    o_en_reg <= 1'b1;
                end
            end
        end
        
        // Assign outputs
        assign result = {1'b0, sum_stage8};
        assign o_en = o_en_reg;
    </implementation>
</module>
